query: List the top 5 publishers by total spend in fiscal year 2024, with their total spend amounts.
gold_sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 5
antipattern_to_avoid: EXTRACT(YEAR FROM event_date) = 2024 — use date-range form for indexability
